member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scoreboard.IScoreboardExtensions
member.summary: Interface for extending Scoreboard Test Method.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scoreboard.IScoreboardExtensions.ProcessCtvPerPin(Prime.TestMethods.TestInstanceResults,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Processes per pin ctv capture. This function is used to determine exit port of execution.
member.param: The object for holding the exit port and complete DC results.
CTV data collected by functional test.
member.returns: True if test passed, false if test failed.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scoreboard.IScoreboardExtensions.ProcessFailures(Prime.TestMethods.TestInstanceResults,Prime.FunctionalService.ICaptureFailureTest)
member.summary: Processes failure capture test. This function is used to determine exit port of execution.
member.param: The object for holding the exit port and complete DC results.
member.returns: True if test passed, false if test failed.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scoreboard.IScoreboardExtensions.ProcessCtvPerCycle(Prime.TestMethods.TestInstanceResults,Prime.FunctionalService.ICaptureCtvPerCycleTest)
member.summary: Processes captureCtvPerCycle test This function is used to determine exit port of execution.
member.param: The object for holding the exit port and complete DC results.
Per cycle ctv test to be processed.
member.returns: True if test passed, false if test failed.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scoreboard.IScoreboardExtensions.CreateTestInstanceResults
member.summary: Called prior to any test in Execute to generate the test instance results object.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scoreboard.IScoreboardExtensions.GetDynamicPinMask
member.summary: Gets the list of pins to mask execution after execution. The test method will merge this list with the ones from the test instance parameter.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scoreboard.PrimeScoreboardTestMethod
member.summary: Test method responsible for executing different variations of functional test.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scoreboard.PrimeScoreboardTestMethod.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Scoreboard.PrimeScoreboardTestMethod.#ctor(Prime.BusinessLogic.ScoreboardLogger.IScoreboardFactory)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The IScoreboardFactory object for dependency injection.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Scoreboard.PrimeScoreboardTestMethod.CtvCycleCaptureMode
member.summary: Enum to determine state of CTV cycle capture mode. Enabled means ctv capture is by cycle, disabled means ctv capture will be by pin.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Scoreboard.PrimeScoreboardTestMethod.CtvCycleCaptureMode.ENABLED
member.summary: ENABLED sets ctv capture to be by cycle.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Scoreboard.PrimeScoreboardTestMethod.CtvCycleCaptureMode.DISABLED
member.summary: DISABLED sets ctv capture to be by pin.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scoreboard.PrimeScoreboardTestMethod.Patlist
member.summary: Gets or sets Patlist to execute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scoreboard.PrimeScoreboardTestMethod.TimingsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets TimingsTc for plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scoreboard.PrimeScoreboardTestMethod.LevelsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets LevelsTc for plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scoreboard.PrimeScoreboardTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IApplyEndSequenceParameter#ApplyEndSequence
member.summary: Gets or sets the ApplyEndSequence at the end of the test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scoreboard.PrimeScoreboardTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IPrePlistCommonParam#PrePlist
member.summary: Gets or sets the PrePlist callback to plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scoreboard.PrimeScoreboardTestMethod.MaskPins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated pins for mask.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scoreboard.PrimeScoreboardTestMethod.CtvCapturePins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated pins for CTV capture.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scoreboard.PrimeScoreboardTestMethod.CtvCapturePerCycleMode
member.summary: Gets or sets CTV capture mode. If DISABLED (default), CTV capture will be per pin. If ENABLED it will be per cycle.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scoreboard.PrimeScoreboardTestMethod.FunctionalTest
member.summary: Gets the functional test to capture failures.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Scoreboard.PrimeScoreboardTestMethod.ExitPort
member.summary: Gets or sets the custom port to be overriden by user..
